ItacPersonItem.Notes: Member of the Solleciti Academy in Treviso (as from 1588), joined the Accademia Veneziana from 1592, and the Fecondi Academy, in Padua in 1604. He was also member of the Filarmonici Academy in Verona (as from 1614), with the nickname "L`Opportuno". See his biography by Gino Benzoni, in DBI. Bonifacio`s portrait is taken from Tomasini, Elogia virorum (1644).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
